loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase line-to-line voltage history (R-Y, Y-B, B-N) against ±5% range (381.5V - 418.5V). Max Deviation and Worst Spread are derived from logged voltage columns. Event counts (Swell/Sag) are narrative summaries.
